completed_tasks.name: Phase 310 RESEARCH.md generated by gsd-phase-researcher (Validation Architecture + 5 findings + 4 open questions resolved)

remaining_tasks.name: Resolve UI safety gate — generate UI-SPEC via /gsd-ui-phase 310 OR re-run /gsd-plan-phase 310 --skip-ui
Spawn gsd-pattern-mapper untuk produce 310-PATTERNS.md (analog files + code excerpts)
Spawn gsd-planner — create 310-XX-PLAN.md files (likely 2 plans: implementation + manual UAT scaffold per VALIDATION.md Wave 0)

blockers.description: UI safety gate triggered — phase punya UI indicators (button disable + tooltip + toast) tapi UI-SPEC.md tidak ada. Workflow stop until user pilih: (a) /gsd-ui-phase 310 first, atau (b) re-run /gsd-plan-phase 310 --skip-ui untuk skip gate.
blockers.workaround: User pilih pause work — defer keputusan ke session berikutnya

human_actions_pending.action: Pilih: /gsd-ui-phase 310 (full UI design contract) ATAU /gsd-plan-phase 310 --skip-ui (lanjut tanpa UI-SPEC, scope sudah locked di CONTEXT.md D-01..D-03)
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 310 UI scope minimal — 3 elements: disable button + tooltip + toast inline alert. CONTEXT.md sudah punya 7 decisions termasuk implementation pattern reference. Recommendation: --skip-ui untuk efisiensi.

decisions.decision: Research first (bukan skip-research) untuk Phase 310 planning
decisions.rationale: User pilih research first untuk schema verification (D-05 fallback), test infrastructure check (SC #5), dan Nyquist validation strategy

decisions.decision: VALIDATION.md draft pakai dotnet build (compile gate, ≤ 92 warnings) + Playwright TypeScript E2E sebagai sampling framework
decisions.rationale: Repo TIDAK punya .NET test project (verified via find). SC #5 'Task.WhenAll integration test' wajib via manual concurrent dual-tab UAT + SQL queries (per RESEARCH.md finding #3)

decisions.decision: Schema D-05 dedup CONFIRMED feasible via UserNotifications.AnyAsync(Type+Message LIKE)
decisions.rationale: Per RESEARCH.md finding #2 — UserNotification.cs L11-73 punya field UserId, Type, Title, Message, CreatedAt cukup untuk dedup. Fallback NotificationSentAt column TIDAK perlu dipakai (CONTEXT.md asumsi awal salah, sudah corrected via research)

decisions.decision: RESEARCH finding #4 — D-02 NomorSertifikat gating impractical karena MonitoringSessionViewModel TIDAK punya field NomorSertifikat
decisions.rationale: Recommendation: gate purely by Status==Completed (cukup untuk SC #2 acceptance — Status=Completed always = sudah finalized regardless cert). Planner harus update CONTEXT.md D-02 condition.

decisions.decision: RESEARCH finding #5 — D-03 friendly response WAJIB pakai inline JS alert injection, BUKAN TempData[Info]
decisions.rationale: TempData[Info] cuma render setelah full page reload. FinalizeEssayGrading dipanggil via fetch (AJAX), jadi butuh inline JS alert helper (extracted dari existing pattern AssessmentMonitoringDetail.cshtml L1383-1389)

uncommitted_files: .planning/phases/309-worker-cert-defensive-submitted-status/309-01-PLAN.md (?? — pre-existing untracked dari Phase 309 sesi sebelumnya)
next_action: User pilih path resolution UI gate: (a) /gsd-ui-phase 310 untuk generate UI-SPEC dulu, ATAU (b) /gsd-plan-phase 310 --skip-ui untuk skip gate dan lanjut langsung ke pattern_mapper + planner. Setelah itu plan-phase workflow lanjut step 7.8 (pattern mapper) → step 8 (planner) → step 10 (checker) → step 13.
context_notes: Phase 310 = Essay Finalize Idempotency. CONTEXT.md punya 7 decisions D-01..D-07. RESEARCH.md sudah include 8-dimension Validation Architecture (Nyquist), schema verification UserNotifications, 8 pitfalls, code examples canonical dari GradingService L195-212. RESEARCH 4 open questions sudah resolved di research artifacts (lihat HANDOFF decisions field). Implementation pattern jelas: (1) capture rowsAffected dari ExecuteUpdateAsync di L2784-2790, (2) gate audit log + cert + notif call, (3) D-05 dedup via UserNotifications.AnyAsync, (4) D-02 gate by Status==Completed only (drop NomorSertifikat condition per research finding #4), (5) D-03 inline JS alert injection bukan TempData. UI gate = blocker; sisanya runway.
